daily.today_energy: Mercury's whispering something real today—your intuition's on fire. Channel that quiet knowing into whatever you're building. The universe is listening when you listen first.
daily.love: Someone's noticing the depth you've been keeping close. Whether it's new or familiar, vulnerability hits different when you lead with authenticity. Let them see the real you today.
daily.career: Your ideas have weight right now. Don't dim them down or wait for permission. That project or pitch you've been sitting on? The energy supports you showing up fully and claiming your space.
daily.health: Your body's asking for grounding—think long walks, cold water, or something tactile. Your nervous system thrives when you slow down intentionally. Rest isn't laziness; it's strategic.

weekly.overview: This week's energy invites you to soften your edges, Cap. You've been grinding hard, and the cosmos is gently nudging you to actually enjoy the fruits of your labor. Let yourself be surprised by unexpected moments of joy.
weekly.love: Whether you're single or coupled up, this is your week to be more vulnerable. That guard you keep up? It's safe to lower it a bit. Someone's paying attention, and honestly, they dig the real you beneath the power moves.
weekly.career: Mercury's got your back professionally. Speak up about that idea you've been sitting on—the timing feels right. You might notice doors opening in ways that feel almost serendipitous. Trust the momentum, but don't force it.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for rest that actually feels good, not just productive. Move in ways that feel nourishing rather than punishing. A little tenderness toward yourself goes a long way this week.
